source: Istio Bookinfo sample (istio-1.30.0/samples/bookinfo) on kind + Istio + Jaeger; see ../deploy/deploy.sh
capture_method: Traffic driven through the Istio ingress gateway (workload/traffic.sh or a marked curl). Masked captured with ratings scaled to 0 (workload/inject-ratings-outage.sh on); healthy with ratings restored. Pulled from the Jaeger query API GET /jaeger/api/traces/<id> (marker-first, W3C traceparent).
trace_format: Jaeger query-API JSON ({"data":[{"traceID","spans","processes"}]}); consumed by io.mist.core.oracle.shape.TraceModel.fromJaegerJson and io.mist.core.workflow.TraceWorkflowExtractor (reads concrete paths from the http.url/http.target span tags, not the route-aggregated operationName).

oracle_evidence_traces.role: Direct-oracle A/B for the /productpage BFF (see docs/main-contribution/evidence/bookinfo_hidden_downstream.md). The oracle is run directly on these via OracleCheck.java.

traces.note: 9 spans, all 2xx (ratings restored). Oracle silent — the control.

generation_input_traces.role: MIST generation input (trace.file.path=traces). Healthy /api/v1 API-workflow traces that TraceWorkflowExtractor turns into scenarios; MistGenerator then emits a JUnit test per conf operation. The /api/v1/products/{id}/reviews root is what masks at execution time. End-to-end pipeline evidence: docs/main-contribution/evidence/bookinfo_e2e_pipeline.md.

traces.note: productpage->reviews->ratings; the endpoint that MASKS under a ratings outage.
direct ratings call; fails LOUD (503) under outage.

note: Small demonstrative corpus. The /productpage masked+healthy traces are the direct-oracle A/B; the gen_api_* traces are the generation input for the full-pipeline e2e demo (run-oracle-e2e.sh). A >=100-trace nominal corpus (SP1) comes from a sustained workload run; not required for the phenomenon demonstration.
